product.title: Maybelline Dream Fresh Skin Hydrating BB cream, 8-in-1 Skin Perfecting Beauty Balm with Broad Spectrum SPF 30, Sheer Tint Coverage, Oil-Free, Light/Medium, 1 Fl Oz
featureBullets: Dream BB fresh 8-in-1 skin perfecting beauty Balm hydrates, protects with SPF 30, brightens, blurs imperfections, smoothens, enhances, is oil-free and available in 5 skin-tone perfecting shades
Light Coverage Foundation + Skincare Benefits = Bb Cream: BB Cream adjusts to skin tone, minimizes and blurs the look of pores, and reduces the appearance of redness, Oil-free

Best Face Forward: Maybelline has sheer, medium, and full coverage foundation in liquid and powder foundation formulas, and a range of concealers, face primers, contour, highlighter, and pressed and setting powder to help you create a perfect canvas

Create any look with Maybelline, foundation, BB creams, concealers, and setting powders for the perfect canvas, eye shadows, mascara, brow pencils, and eyeliners for any eye look and lip products, from showstopping lipstick to plumping lip gloss
product.description: Dream fresh BB cream 8-in-1 skin perfector is the 1 step wonder for a good skin day, everyday.Â Get 8 skin benefits in 1 simple step, blurs imperfections, brigh10s, evens skin-t1, smoothes, hydrates, enhances, protects with SPF 30, and contains 0% oils and heavy ingRedients. By MAYBELLINE.

specification.value: America’s #1 BB cream, Dream BB Fresh is hydrating and lightweight. Dream BB Fresh Cream gives you a natural, skin-perfected look. Our BB (which stands for “Beauty Balm”) cream combines skincare and makeup to perfect skin in 1 simple step. It glides on easily for smooth application, providing sheer coverage with the added benefit of SPF to protect you from the harsh rays of the sun. Dream Fresh has 8 skin-loving benefits in 1. Hydrates. Protects with SPF 30. Brightens. Blurs imperfections. Smoothes. Enhances. Oil-free and without any heavy ingredients. Available in 5 skin-tone perfecting shades. This skin hydrating beauty balm leaves skin feeling fresh with a natural finish. Suitable for all skin types, Dream BB Fresh suits a wide range of skin tones and is non-comedogenic.
suits a wide range of skin tones
#936 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #2 in BB Facial Creams

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this BB cream provides nice sheer coverage that evens out complexion and matches skin perfectly, while being lightweight and easy to blend. The product is moisturizing without being greasy, and customers appreciate its dewy finish and smooth application. They consider it good value for money, with one customer noting it offers decent coverage at half the price.

reviews.reviewText: LOVE THIS!! It gives me such a natural look without being heavy or thick. How I use: I follow my normal skin care routine, even my regular moisturizer, spray a setting spray on my face, apply brows, then I go in with this BB cream (using a brush) after the bb cream I apply concealer under my eyes, bronzer, blush, setting powder and I spray setting spray one more time. This is light weight so my skin feels like it can breathe. It’s easy to blend and apply, I’m sure you could use your fingers if you wanted. I want to be clear this is not a full coverage foundation this is however an amazing bb cream with buildable coverage. My skin is on the drier side which is why I apply my regular moisturizer under this. I consider the BB cream to be more of a tinted sunscreen. It gives me more of a dewy look, I’m not sure how it would work for oily skin. I can wear the cream all day and it will budge a bit, but that’s mostly in the summer. In the winter, the cream holds up pretty well. I recommend it to everyone.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 8, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Lightweight Everyday Moisturizer with Great Tint
reviews.reviewText: I have been purchasing this product for years, and I absolutely love it. It’s a lightweight everyday moisturizer that feels comfortable on the skin while providing a nice, natural tint. I especially appreciate that it gives me enough coverage that I don’t need to use foundation every day. The price is very reasonable for the quality, and I definitely feel it’s worth every penny. A reliable staple in my skincare routine!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 24, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I’ve been using the Maybelline Dream Fresh Skin Hydrating BB Cream for about a year now and I’m honestly impressed. It gives me just enough coverage to even out my skin tone without looking heavy or cakey — perfect for busy mornings when I want to look put together but not like I’m wearing a full face of makeup. It feels really lightweight and breathable, and I love that it has SPF and hydration built in. My skin stays comfortable all day and doesn’t feel greasy or tight. It blends easily with my fingers and still looks natural up close. The only reason it’s not a full 5 stars is the shade range — I had to mix a little with another product to get my perfect match. Other than that, it’s an amazing everyday BB cream and a staple in my makeup bag. Would definitely repurchase!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 7, 2026

reviews.reviewText: For those of us with mature skin, this is a wonderful addition to our daily makeup routine. I can no longer wear matte foundation and have to be very careful with matte powders. When I apply this before my satin foundation, I get a lovely soft glow. On days I don't want to go full tilt with my makeup, I use this on it's own followed by a light dusting of finishing powder. It leaves a soft beautiful finish. Priced much better than the high-end BBs too. My skin type is combination but mature so not looking dry is very important. On it's own, it lasts 8 hours if I'm not exercising or working in the garden etc. It's not sticky and looks very natural. Tip: If it's a little too shiny for you, a light dusting of finishing powder mutes it to a lovely satin finish.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 14, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: The best beauty balm and tinted coverage
reviews.reviewText: This is magical stuff! It is so amazing for matching my skintone, for the sunscreen, and for such a smooth light feel. It is not oily at all, a little goes a long way and the consistency and coverage are amazing. It works so well! This is the absolute best!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 15, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Finally found my unicorn beauty balm!
reviews.reviewText: I am honestly amazed by the quality and performance of this product. Have spent a small fortune on premium brands looking for a unicorn product that moisturizes without being too shiny or sticky, that provides some coverage without looking like a mask, that has spf without nasty chemicals, that matches my skin color without making me look washed-out, plays well with my moisturizer and rosacea medication, etc etc etc. This product checks all the boxes, for less than $10!!! It glides on smoothly with just my fingertips and leaves zero streaks. I do wish they made one shade lighter in a peachy/ivory tone because even the lightest shade (100) is a hair too dark and yellow for me, but it looks totally natural if i apply a thin veil of translucent powder. I'm so glad i found this and hope they make it forever.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on October 13, 2025

reviews.reviewText: If you’re older. It doesn’t cover age spots and broken blood vessels but for someone younger it would be great
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: My absolute favorite for everyday wear! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
reviews.reviewText: This is the perfect product for that 'no-makeup' look. It’s incredibly lightweight, feels just like a moisturizer, and the added SPF 30 is a huge plus. It evens out my skin tone perfectly without feeling heavy or greasy. Unbeatable value for the price!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 2, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Product was delivered as shown. A little bit smaller than expected (but to be fair I didn’t pay much attention to size when choosing this BB cream). I like the coverage and it really is hydrating- no flakiness without looking oily (what I experienced with other brands). It lasts me a full day at the office, but by the time I get home there is no real need for make-up remover as the tint and coverage is all but gone- but I can’t say this is exclusive to this BB cream as I have faced the same with other foundations and creams (perhaps best paired with a primer then?) Also the other BB creams that I’ve used tend to transfer a lot easier to tissues and phones, whereas this doesn’t as much. It was really useful that seller included the differences between the BB creams as that made it a-lot easier to buy the correct product for my skin type.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Arab Emirates on February 15, 2023

reviews.reviewText: It’s a good sub when I have run out of other product. But there are better products out there for men especially
Absolutely like this product, feels like a second skin. Good tone correction and love the dewy look.
As I can't get my normal foundation anymore this is tge next best thing...it was delivered earlier than expected
